case_title: LORENZO COSTANTINO VS. SCOTT PAUL FULMERGARDNER

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSTANTINO, LORENZO AS TO DEFENDANT FULMERGARDNER, SCOTT PAUL
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $132.50 SERVED APR-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FULMERGARDNER, SCOTT PAUL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF COSTANTINO, LORENZO AS TO DEFENDANT FULMERGARDNER, SCOTT PAUL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-24-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COSTANTINO, LORENZO AS TO DEFENDANT FULMERGARDNER, SCOTT PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-24-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LORENZP COSTANTINO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOTT PAUL FULMERGARDNER IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED, HOWEVER PLAINTIFF HAD UNFILED PROOF IT WITH HIM. DEFENDANT CONFIRMED HOW HE WAS SERVED (LEFT ON DOORSTEP). PLAINTIFF WILL FILE SERVICE NEXT WEEK, AND NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON ACCEPTED SERVICE AND GRANTED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MORE TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE:CONTINUANCE PER REQUST OF DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
